Buena atención con precios razonables

Good service at reasonable prices.

reviews.comment:
Parada importante en esa ruta donde no sobran lugares para parar. Los playeros y quienes atienden el local son amenos y muy agradables.

(Translated by Google)
An important stop on this route, with plenty of places to stop. The beach attendants and staff are friendly and very pleasant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHZ2QyVG13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente no hay otra estación donde cargar en Garayalde.. Los playeros van de mala gana a trabajar y son groseros. Adentro del shop al menos son más amables. La nafta es regular.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, there's no other gas station in Garayalde. The attendants are reluctant to work and are rude. At least they're friendlier inside the convenience store. The gas quality is mediocre.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHenBxZll3EAE

reviews.comment:
El único lugar para cargar combustible en 150 km. Rico café. Hay agua para termo. Todo lo necesario para seguir el viaje. Personal dispuesto y amable.

(Translated by Google)
The only place to refuel for 150 km. Great coffee. They have hot water for thermoses. Everything you need to continue your journey. Helpful and friendly staff.
